meta.title: AI Multilingual Text Review
meta.description: Spelling, grammar, and syntax correction for biblical JSON and commentary, with full change tracking.

upload.title: Upload JSON
upload.hint: Drop a .json file or click to browse. Large files may take several minutes.

options.title: Review options
options.targetLangHint: Used for minimal fixes when a short passage is in the wrong language.
options.treatBiblical: Treat all biblical "texto" fields as Google-translated
options.treatBiblicalHint: Use when your JSON lacks metadata (traduzido_google, fonte, etc.). Otherwise only Google-marked "texto" or content after "1. Esra" is reviewed.

progress.note: Very large files may take a while. Do not close this page.

changes.empty: No changes recorded (text was already acceptable or nothing was eligible).

errors.network: Network or server error. Ensure the API is running and OPENAI_API_KEY is set.

footer.note: Only spelling, grammar, and syntax. Meaning and integrity of the text are preserved.
